descriptions: Versace Longo fought a war with Giovinazzo over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: si scontrarono con i Giovinazzo (di Taurianova), in una guerra per il controllo del traffico di droga, tra il 1988 e il 1990

descriptions: These death squads were set up to fight ETA.
edges.evidence_quote: death squads, including the Batallón Vasco Español, Triple A, Grupos Antiterroristas de Liberación (GAL) were illegally set up by officials within the Spanish government to fight ETA.

descriptions: Batallón Vasco Español was a death squad that preceded GAL in targeting ETA.
edges.evidence_quote: GAL activities were a follow-up of similar dirty war actions by death squads, actively supported by members of Spanish security forces and secret services, using names such as Batallón Vasco Español active from 1975 to 1981.

descriptions: The ABT fought and nearly exterminated the Mandingo Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The ABT's first war was with the black gang Mandingo Warriors, who were beaten to the point of near extermination within the prison system.

descriptions: ABT attacked Mandingo Warriors nearly to extinction.
edges.evidence_quote: La primera guerra de la ABT fue con la pandilla negra Mandingo Warriors, quienes fueron atacados hasta el punto de casi exterminarlos dentro del sistema penitenciario.

Brödraskapet.description: Swedish prison gang founded on May 27, 1995, by inmates at Kumla maximum security prison. It is considered a criminal organization by Swedish police under EU criteria. The gang engages in drug and arms trafficking, robbery, murder, and extortion, with an estimated 60-70 members nationwide.

descriptions: Infobox lists Hells Angels as rivals of Brödraskapet.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels

descriptions: The infobox lists Brödraskapet as an ally of the Serb mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: The Hells Angels were alleged to have killed the vice president of the Hirdmen Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 3, 1998, the vice president of the Hirdmen Motorcycle Club in Stockholm was killed by several gunshots to the neck. ... The investigation alleged the Hells Angels milieu as perpetrators, although no one was convicted.

Latin Counts.description: The Latin Counts is a Latino street gang based in Chicago, Illinois, with a significant branch in Detroit, Michigan. Founded in 1955 by Tejano youth in the Pilsen neighborhood, it is a member of the People Nation alliance. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, and other criminal activities.

descriptions: Infobox lists Latin Counts as an ally of Juggalo gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Norteños , Bloods , Crips , Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Maniac Latin Disciples , Spanish Cobras , Simon City Royals , Folk Nation , People Nation , Vice Lords , Black P. Stones , Latin Kings , Latin Counts

Head Hunters Motorcycle Club.description: New Zealand outlaw motorcycle club formed in 1967 as a street gang in East Auckland, evolving into an MC in 1985. Based in Ellerslie with chapters across the North Island, it is involved in drug trafficking, theft, murder, and money laundering. The club has over 1,000 criminal convictions and is considered one of the most dangerous organized crime groups in New Zealand.

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Head Hunters.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine ... which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Head Hunters fought Black Power in a brawl in 1967.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Head Hunters gang engaged in a brawl against then-rivals the Black Power

descriptions: Head Hunters patched over Epitaph Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: the Epitaph Riders of Christchurch

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies of Filthy Few.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels MC , Nomads , Filthy Few

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies of Hells Angels MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels MC , Nomads , Filthy Few

descriptions: Head Hunters members killed a Highway 61 member in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: murdering rival-gang, Highway 61 , member Steven Bliss

descriptions: Head Hunters are rivals of King Cobras.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: King Cobras

descriptions: Head Hunters are allies of Nomads.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels MC , Nomads , Filthy Few

descriptions: Head Hunters patched over Satan's Slaves MC in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: the Satan's Slaves MC in 2014

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Sinn Fein MC by patching them over in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Head Hunters "patched over" the Wellington-based Sinn Fein MC in 2011

descriptions: Hells Angels are allied with Head Hunters, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: New Zealand's Hells Angels are allied with the Head Hunters and the Road Knights.

descriptions: King Cobras and Head Hunters cooperated in a large methamphetamine ring in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2003, members of the King Cobras ran a large methamphetamine ring along with the Head Hunters in one of Aucklands biggest drug cases.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power, Head Hunters

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn, GAS Gang, Ghetto Boys, OC (Organised Crime), Roadside G's

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Proietti clan

descriptions: Clan Proietti killed a Banda della Magliana member, sparking a violent war between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Il primo componente della Banda a cadere fu Franco Giuseppucci , ucciso a Piazza San Cosimato nel cuore del quartiere di Trastevere, il 13 settembre 1980 , in un agguato orchestrato da parte di esponenti del clan rivale della famiglia Proietti , detti i Pesciaroli

descriptions: The Banda della Magliana was at war with the Proietti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: la guerra al clan rivale dei Proietti

descriptions: Casamonica clan helped eliminate the Proietti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Clan helps the Banda della Magliana in eliminating the rival Proietti Clan which occurred between the end of the 1970s and the beginning of the 1980s.

Gente Nueva.description: Gente Nueva is the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel, founded in 1995 in Sonora, Mexico. It consists of well-trained gunmen who battle rival cartels, particularly the Juárez Cartel and its enforcer La Línea, for control of smuggling routes in Ciudad Juárez. The group is involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, and murder, and has been active in the Sinaloa Cartel's turf war since 2008.

descriptions: Gente Nueva is listed as an ally of Artistas Asesinos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Gente Nueva , * Los Salazar , *

descriptions: Artistas Asesinos fought alongside Gente Nueva as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa cartel, which had employed the gangs known as Artistas Asesinos and Los Mexicles , along with its armed wing, Gente Nueva

descriptions: CJNG is listed as a rival of Gente Nueva in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Zetas , Juárez Cartel , La Línea , Los Muertos , Knights Templar Cartel , CJNG , La Mayiza

descriptions: Gente Nueva fought a war against the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Gente Nueva has served as the main branch of the organization in Ciudad Juárez ... where they have engaged in a four-year war with the Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Gente Nueva fought a four-year war against the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Gente Nueva ha servido como la rama principal de la organización en Ciudad Juárez y en el resto del estado, donde se han involucrado en una guerra de cuatro años contra el Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel is listed as a rival of Gente Nueva in the infobox.

Pettingill family.description: Melbourne-based criminal family headed by matriarch Kath Pettingill, involved in drug trafficking, arms dealing, and armed robberies. Two sons were acquitted of the 1988 Walsh Street police shootings. The family was weakened after the murder of high-ranking member Victor Peirce during the Melbourne gangland killings.

Cártel de Caborca.description: Mexican criminal organization based in Caborca, Sonora, founded in 2015 by Rafael Caro Quintero and Miguel Caro Quintero. It is involved in drug trafficking, particularly fentanyl and methamphetamine, and operates in several Mexican states. The group is currently led by José Gil Caro Quintero and is engaged in a territorial dispute with Los Chapitos. Despite the arrest of its founder in 2022, the organization remains active.

descriptions: Sajid Emilio Quintero Navidad, a leader of Cártel de Caborca's armed wing, was formerly a plaza boss for Beltrán Leyva, indicating a past structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Sajid fue jefe de plaza de los Beltrán Leyva

descriptions: Los Salazar are in conflict with Los Páez (aligned with Cártel de Caborca), implying conflict with Cártel de Caborca.
edges.evidence_quote: Según la Secretaría de Marina advirtió del creciente conflicto entre células delincuenciales Los Páez y/o Los Paleteros ... y Los Cazadores junto a Los Salazar

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel Independiente de Sonora as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupos Criminales: , Los Chapitos , Cártel Independiente de Sonora

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación, Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Cártel de Caborca allied with Cártel de Juárez to dispute territories.
edges.evidence_quote: El grupo se alió con el Cártel de Juárez esto para disputar las zonas de Sonora y Chihuahua

descriptions: Los Cazadores are in conflict with Los Páez (aligned with Cártel de Caborca), implying conflict with Cártel de Caborca.

descriptions: Sin City Titans is a sibling club of Sin City Deciples for metric bike riders.
edges.evidence_quote: riders of metric bikes, including sport bikes, are able to join the Deciple's sibling club, the Sin City Titans.

descriptions: FRDKI was reported to cooperate with RCD-Goma.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of smaller Mai-Mai groups, such as the Mudundu 40 / Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI) and Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre / Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la Républíque Démocratique du Congo (MLAZ/FURNAC), were reported to cooperate with the Rwandan military and Rally for Congolese Democracy–Goma (RCD-Goma).

Serb mafia in Scandinavia.description: Organized crime group operating in Sweden, Norway, and Denmark, founded in the 1970s by Yugoslav guest-workers. Based in Stockholm and Copenhagen, it engages in cigarette smuggling, drug trafficking, robbery, and extortion. The gang gained media attention in the 1990s under leaders like Dragan Joksović and is allegedly led by Milan Ševo. It remains active with an estimated 250 members.

descriptions: Brotherhood became a Black Pistons branch in the UK.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brotherhood club in Birmingham then became Black Pistons' first branch in the United Kingdom, on February 17, 2003.

descriptions: Two former Brotherhood members were killed at Hells Angels clubhouse, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 August 2001, two former members of the Brotherhood gang, Johan Ljung and Zlatko Radojkovic, were stabbed and beaten to death at the Hells Angels' clubhouse in Gunnilse outside Gothenburg.

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division Finland had close relations with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS also maintained particularly close relations with the Feuerkrieg Division in neighboring Estonia.

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division is the Baltic states branch of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: Baltic states (Feuerkrieg Division)

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division was modeled after Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2018, a group which was modeled after Atomwaffen and called itself the Feuerkrieg Division was established in the Baltic states

descriptions: Atomwaffen Finland cooperated with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The Finnish Resistance Movement and its successor Atomwaffen Finland cooperated with the group as well.

descriptions: Finnish Resistance Movement cooperated with Feuerkrieg Division.

edges.evidence_quote: The group has links to the Atomwaffen Division and the Feuerkrieg Division, which are far-right extremist groups.

descriptions: Obshchak is an umbrella organization that includes Estonian organized crime groups.
edges.evidence_quote: a traditional umbrella organisation of criminal groups in Estonia, a trade union of sorts that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries of the spheres of interest of various groups such as the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime

descriptions: Order of the Blood is controlled by the Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: On June 23, 2005, after a 20-month investigation, a federal strike force raided six houses in northeastern Ohio which belonged to members of the 'Order of the Blood', a criminal organization which is controlled by the Aryan Brotherhood.

descriptions: Order of the Blood is a criminal organization controlled by the Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: una organización criminal controlada por la Hermandad Aria.

descriptions: Satan's Guard is a puppet club of Hells Angels in Saguenay region.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

descriptions: Di Biasi and Russo fought a war in the late 1990s and early 2000s.

856 Gang.description: The 856 Gang is a Canadian criminal organization active in the Northwest Territories and British Columbia, originating as a youth gang in Aldergrove, BC. It is involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, and murder. The gang has ties to the Hells Angels and has been targeted by multiple RCMP operations, including Project Gloom.

descriptions: The 856 Gang is now considered a rival of the Hells Angels, having formerly been allied.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the gang is thought to be rivals of the Hells Angels who were formerly in alliance with them.

descriptions: The 856 Gang made ties with a Hells Angels member, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Until September, 2007, they had made ties to a man named Len Pelletier of the Hells Angels

descriptions: The infobox lists Red Scorpions as an ally of the 856 Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Red Scorpions

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels , UN (gang)

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... 856 gang

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 856 gang

descriptions: Tehrik-e-Hurmat-e-Rasool is an affiliate of LeT.
edges.evidence_quote: On 25 June 2014, the United States added several of LeT affiliates including Jamaat-ud-Dawa, Al-Anfal Trust, Tehrik-e-Hurmat-e-Rasool, and Tehrik-e-Tahafuz Qibla Awwal to the list of foreign terrorist organizations.

Jamaican posse.description: Jamaican posses are organized crime gangs originating in Jamaica, based in Kingston, Spanish Town, and Montego Bay, with diaspora branches in the US, Canada, and UK. They emerged in the 1970s as political enforcers for the Jamaica Labour Party and People's National Party, later evolving into drug and arms trafficking organizations. Known for their involvement in cocaine distribution and violence, they have ties to Colombian cartels and other criminal groups.

descriptions: Shower Posse is a subset of Jamaican posses.
edges.evidence_quote: The two largest Jamaican posses in the U.S., the Shower Posse and the Spangler Posse, trace their origins to political parties in Kingston.

descriptions: Spangler Posse is a subset of Jamaican posses.
edges.evidence_quote: The two largest Jamaican posses in the U.S., the Shower Posse and the Spangler Posse, trace their origins to political parties in Kingston.

Chee Kung Tong.description: The Chee Kung Tong is a Chinese secret society established in 1880, with roots possibly dating to 18th-century Fujian, China. It promotes Chinese values, customs, and democracy, and is known for supporting Sun Yat-sen's revolution against the Qing Dynasty. The organization has an active presence in the United States and Canada, with headquarters in San Francisco.

descriptions: Chow avoided involvement with the undercover agent posing as La Cosa Nostra, indicating no cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Chow was secretly recorded by the FBI while he was conferring with 'George' Heng Nieh (Chow's driver), stating that he did not want the CKT involved with 'Jordan', the undercover agent posing as a member of the Mafia

descriptions: Chee Kung Tong had rivalries with Gee Sin Seer and Bo Sin Seer in San Francisco.
edges.evidence_quote: Two of the more notorious rivals to the Chee Kong tong were the Gee Sin Seer and the Bo Sin Seer...

descriptions: Chee Kung Tong had rivalries with Gee Sin Seer and Bo Sin Seer in San Francisco.
edges.evidence_quote: Two of the more notorious rivals to the Chee Kong tong were the Gee Sin Seer and the Bo Sin Seer...

descriptions: Allen Leung held leadership roles in both organizations simultaneously.
edges.evidence_quote: Allen Leung was president of the Hop Sing Tong (HST) and dragon head of the CKT

descriptions: Chee Kung Tong and Kuomintang were in conflict after Sun Yat-sen shifted support to KMT, leading to tensions and criticism.
edges.evidence_quote: Sun reneged on his promise to assist the organization, and began supporting the Kuomintang (KMT) instead. The Chee Kung Tong criticized Sun, who in turn criticized the Chee Kung Tong and labeled them as being incompatible with republican China.

descriptions: Chee Kung Tong was established by the Tiandihui.
edges.evidence_quote: One of the first tongs was established by the secret society Chee Kung Tong, which aimed to restore the power of the Ming dynasty by removing the new Manchu rulers of the Qing dynasty.

descriptions: No direct relationship between Lazarus Group and Chee Kung Tong is stated in the text.
Ping On leader Tse was allied with the head of the local Chee Kung Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: Tse was allied with Harry Mook (Goon Chun Yee), head of the local CKT

descriptions: Tse was a member of Hung Mun before founding Ping On, suggesting a predecessor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: he joined the Hung Mun (Chee Kung Tong or CKT) social club in 1977, then founded the Ping On Club in 1982

descriptions: PIJ and al-Aqsa Martyrs' Brigades jointly claimed a suicide bombing.
edges.evidence_quote: Both the al-Aqsa Martyrs' Brigades and the PIJ claim responsibility for a suicide bombing at an Eilat bakery that killed three.

Guerreros Unidos.description: Mexican criminal organization based in Morelos and Guerrero, founded in 2010 by Cleotilde Toribio Rentería after the fragmentation of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel. Engaged in drug trafficking, homicide, kidnapping, extortion, and human trafficking. Notorious for involvement in the 2014 disappearance of 43 students. Currently active and in conflict with multiple rival cartels.

descriptions: Guerreros Unidos is a splinter group of the Beltrán-Leyva Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Guerreros Unidos (United Warriors) in Morelos and Guerrero

edges.evidence_quote: Fragmentación ... - Guerreros Unidos en Morelos , Guerrero , Puebla , Oaxaca , y Ciudad de México .

descriptions: John M. Dunn, a member of the Hell's Kitchen Irish mob, was an associate of Schultz's gang and was not targeted in the assassination.
edges.evidence_quote: No apparent attempt was made on the life of Irish mobster John M. Dunn, who later became the brother-in-law of mobster Edward J. McGrath and a powerful member of the Hell's Kitchen Irish mob.

descriptions: Saraya al-Ataba al-Alawiya is a pro-Sistani armed group within PMF.
edges.evidence_quote: There are four major groups organized by Najaf: Saraya al-Ataba al-Abbasiya, Saraya al-Ataba al-Hussainiya, Saraya al-Ataba al-Alawiya, and Liwa 'Ali al-Akbar, corresponding to Shia holy sites in Kadhimiya, Karbala, and Najaf.

descriptions: The White League succeeded the first Klan as a similar paramilitary group.
edges.evidence_quote: After the Klan was suppressed, similar insurgent paramilitary groups emerged that were explicitly dedicated to suppressing Republican voting and removing Republicans from office. These included the White League, founded in Louisiana in 1874, and the Red Shirts.

descriptions: The White League succeeded the Klan as a paramilitary group targeting Black political leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: New groups of insurgents emerged in the mid-1870s, local paramilitary organizations such as the White League

Grady Gang.description: The Grady Gang was a New York City sneak thief gang during the 1860s, organized by fence John D. 'Traveling Mike' Grady after the American Civil War. The gang operated in Broadway's 'Thieves Exchange' and was known for stealing up to $10,000 in goods. Their most successful theft was the robbery of $2 million from financier Rufus L. Lord in 1866. By the end of the decade, most members had retired, but Grady continued as a fence.

descriptions: Grady Gang competed with and then eliminated Marm Mandelbaum's gang by poaching its members.
edges.evidence_quote: Later, he competed against rival fence Marm Mandelbaum who had formed a gang of her own. Grady, however, bought out Mandelbaum by offering her gang members much higher prices than she could afford to pay and she was quickly eliminated as a competitor.

descriptions: Prisoners of War linked to shooting of Bandidos member Toby Mitchell.
edges.evidence_quote: the Prisoners of War, a Hells Angels -affiliated prison gang, has been linked to the crime

descriptions: Hells Angels aligned with Prisoners of War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Hells Angels have aligned themselves with the Coffin Cheaters , Immortals, Red Devils , Satans Soldiers, Vikings and the Prisoners of War, a prison gang operating inside HMP Barwon

descriptions: Clever Kids is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

descriptions: Clever Kids is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.

descriptions: Revolucionarios split from 18th Street and became rivals with the Sureños faction.
edges.evidence_quote: a faction called the "Revolucionarios ("Revolutionaries") split off 18th Street in 2005, becoming rivals with the other members, who came to be known as the Sureños ("Southerners.")

descriptions: The Revolucionarios faction split from Barrio 18 in 2005 and became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: una facción llamada "Revolucionarios" se separó de la calle 18 en 2005, convirtiéndose en rivales con los miembros restantes

descriptions: Schiro crime family is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn Camorra , D'Aquila crime family , Schiro crime family

descriptions: The Lenox Street Boys have a rivalry with the Vamp Hill Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Columbia Point Dawgs (long-standing), Vamp Hill Boys, H Block, X-men, Franklin Hill Giants, Greenwood Street Posse, Ruggles St , 1850 Washington St, Castle Square Cubs
